mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FWK_BATCH_APP ( BATCH_APP_ID, BATCH_APP_NAME, BATCH_APP_FILE_NAME, BATCH_APP_DESC, PRE_BATCH_APP_ID, BATCH_CYCLE, CRON_TEXT, RETRYABLE_YN, PER_WAS_YN, IMPORTANT_TYPE, PROPERTIES, TRX_ID, ORG_ID, IO_TYPE, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID, SLA_SECONDS ) VALUES ( #{dto.batchAppId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.batchAppName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.batchAppFileName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.batchAppDesc, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.preBatchAppId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.batchCycle, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.cronText, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.retryableYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.perWasYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.importantType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.properties, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.trxId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.orgId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.ioType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lastUpdateDtime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lastUpdateUserId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.slaSeconds, jdbcType=NUMERIC} )
mapper.update: UPDATE FWK_BATCH_APP SET BATCH_APP_NAME = #{dto.batchAppName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BATCH_APP_FILE_NAME = #{dto.batchAppFileName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BATCH_APP_DESC = #{dto.batchAppDesc, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PRE_BATCH_APP_ID = #{dto.preBatchAppId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BATCH_CYCLE = #{dto.batchCycle, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CRON_TEXT = #{dto.cronText, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RETRYABLE_YN = #{dto.retryableYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PER_WAS_YN = #{dto.perWasYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IMPORTANT_TYPE = #{dto.importantType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PROPERTIES = #{dto.properties, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TRX_ID = #{dto.trxId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ORG_ID = #{dto.orgId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IO_TYPE = #{dto.ioType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME = #{lastUpdateDtime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID = #{lastUpdateUserId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SLA_SECONDS = #{dto.slaSeconds, jdbcType=NUMERIC} WHERE BATCH_APP_ID = #{batchAppId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FWK_BATCH_APP WHERE BATCH_APP_ID = #{batchAppId}
mapper.sql: b.BATCH_APP_ID AS batchAppId, b.BATCH_APP_NAME AS batchAppName, b.BATCH_APP_FILE_NAME AS batchAppFileName, b.BATCH_APP_DESC AS batchAppDesc, b.PRE_BATCH_APP_ID AS preBatchAppId, b.BATCH_CYCLE AS batchCycle, b.CRON_TEXT AS cronText, b.RETRYABLE_YN AS retryableYn, b.PER_WAS_YN AS perWasYn, b.IMPORTANT_TYPE AS importantType, b.PROPERTIES AS properties, b.TRX_ID AS trxId, b.ORG_ID AS orgId, b.IO_TYPE AS ioType, b.LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS lastUpdateDtime, b.LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID AS lastUpdateUserId, b.SLA_SECONDS AS slaSeconds

ORDER BY
b.BATCH_APP_ID b.BATCH_APP_NAME b.BATCH_APP_FILE_NAME b.BATCH_CYCLE b.RETRYABLE_YN b.PER_WAS_YN b.PRE_BATCH_APP_ID b.IMPORTANT_TYPE b.LAST_UPDATE_DTIME b.LAST_UPDATE_DTIME
ASC DESC DESC
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT b.BATCH_APP_ID
INNER JOIN FWK_WAS_EXEC_BATCH web ON b.BATCH_APP_ID = web.BATCH_APP_ID
WHERE 1=1
)

SELECT DISTINCT
INNER JOIN FWK_WAS_EXEC_BATCH web ON b.BATCH_APP_ID = web.BATCH_APP_ID
WHERE 1=1
